goal: Create a repository-local Codex skill that codifies this project's task-packet, verification, and mainline-guard workflow, and summarize how the newly installed global skills fit into daily usage.
constraints: Keep the custom skill narrow and practical for this repository.
Prefer repository-local skill files under .agents/skills so future collaborators inherit the workflow.
Do not modify product code or gameplay behavior.
deliverables: A new repo-local skill under .agents/skills with usable metadata and concise instructions.
A short usage note tying the installed global skills to this repository workflow.
Validation of the created skill structure.
